subject: [MSB] Update msb gateway docker version
commit_message:
[MSB] Update msb gateway docker version

Fixed MSB-593 packages update in direct dependencises for Istanbul.

Issue-ID: MSB-610
Signed-off-by: jinquanni <ni.jinquan@zte.com.cn>
Change-Id: I6e2e951fbee4fc70dc4d3f0be70f139a91732add
